task_completion.description: Verify that the sales_data.csv file has been imported into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'sales_data' table and its columns (e.g., Sale_Date, Sales_Amount, Product_Category) should be visible in the Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report page has been renamed to 'Trend Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom left of the Power BI canvas should read 'Trend Analysis' instead of 'Page 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three required DAX measures have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data/Fields pane, there should be items named 'Monthly_Sales', 'Moving_Avg_3M', and 'Trend_Variance' with a small calculator icon next to them indicating they are measures.

task_completion.description: Verify that a slicer for Product_Category is present on the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slicer visual should be on the canvas displaying product categories (Furniture, Food, Clothing, Electronics).

task_completion.description: Verify that a card visual displaying Trend_Variance is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A card visual (displaying a single large number) should be on the canvas, and its label/title should indicate it represents 'Trend_Variance'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a line chart comparing Monthly_Sales and Moving_Avg_3M over Sale_Date is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line chart visual should be on the canvas with an X-axis representing time (Sale_Date/Months) and two lines plotted corresponding to 'Monthly_Sales' and 'Moving_Avg_3M'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar at the top of the Power BI window should read 'Moving_Average_Report - Power BI Desktop' or there should be evidence of the file saved on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Power BI Desktop application GUI to build the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Power BI Desktop interface being actively used (menus, canvas, DAX formula bar), rather than terminal commands or scripts attempting to generate a PBIX file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the visuals reflect the actual dataset rather than mocked text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The slicer should show the specific categories from the dataset (Furniture, Food, Clothing, Electronics) and the line chart should show a realistic trend spanning 2023-2024, not static or placeholder images.

integrity.description: Verify that measures are calculated using DAX rather than hardcoded values.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the formula bar is visible in any screenshot, it should show valid DAX functions (e.g., SUM, DATESINPERIOD, AVERAGEX) being used for the created measures.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 1000 rows spanning from 2023-01-01 to 2024-01-01. Product categories are exactly: Furniture, Food, Clothing, Electronics. Required measures to look for in the Data pane: 'Monthly_Sales', 'Moving_Avg_3M', and 'Trend_Variance'. Required visuals on the canvas: a line chart (showing Monthly_Sales and Moving_Avg_3M over Sale_Date), a card (showing Trend_Variance), and a slicer (for Product_Category). The final file must be named Moving_Average_Report.pbix.
